home_body_before: This is the post-init shell: typed API client, auth, routing, tests, SSR opt-in. Add your first feature under

auction_empty: No auctions yet. Log in and create one via the API.
auction_detail_error: Couldn’t load this auction — does it exist?
auction_bid_amount_positive: Bid must be a positive amount
auction_bid_failed: Couldn’t place the bid — try again.
auction_bid_none: No bids yet — be the first.

auction_reject_not_open: This auction is no longer open for bids.
auction_reject_auth_expired: Your session expired — log in again to bid.
